summary: Revize 16 two-phase Komuta Merkezi flow tested end-to-end via Playwright. Setup phase (3-column layout), tactic gate on ROLL DICE, phase transition (LEFT+RIGHT removed, pitch col-span-12, pool-modal opens), player selection from FIFA-style modal, slot placement, draft-phase action bar with -draft suffixed testids, back-to-setup-button visibility logic (visible at 0 placed, hidden at 1+), and full-XI 'KADRON HAZIR' → TURNUVAYA BAŞLA → TournamentScreen all verified. 38/38 effective assertions passing across two test runs (3 initial failures were caused by incorrect slot selector in test script — actual app behavior is correct).
critical_code_review_comments: DraftScreen.jsx is 629 lines — borderline of the 700-line rule; consider extracting the FIFA pool modal and the bottom action bar into separate components for maintainability.
Two roll/change/change-year button instances exist (setup vs draft) with separate testids — slight duplication of handlers' wiring; acceptable for clarity but could be unified.

phase state is derived from xi.some(Boolean) on mount only; if user clears XI from outside DraftScreen, phase wouldn't sync back to 'setup'. Currently App.handleReset returns to 'home' so this is safe in practice.
seed_data_creation: Injected synthetic 11-player XI into localStorage key 'ucl_draft_save_v1' to verify final view & TURNUVAYA BAŞLA → TournamentScreen navigation. Reset between runs by removing the key.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pitch slots use data-testid='pitch-slot-N' (not 'slot-N'). DraftScreen has two-phase state: setup vs draft. After picking a player and BEFORE placing, pool still exists so change-button-draft, change-year-button-draft, reopen-pool-button are visible. After placement, pool is cleared (setPool(null)) so only roll-dice-button-draft remains until next roll. back-to-setup-button only appears when phase='draft' AND filledCount===0. SAVE_KEY is 'ucl_draft_save_v1'.
verified_flows: PHASE 1 setup: KOMUTA MERKEZİ header + DRAFT & DİZİLİŞ & TAKTİK h2; LEFT (team-name-input, formation-*, tactic-*, roll-dice-button); MIDDLE pitch; RIGHT (roster-count 0/11, roster-row-N)
ROLL DICE gate: disabled (disabled attribute present) before tactic; enabled after tactic-GEGENPRESS click
PHASE transition: header → DRAFT MODU; formation/tactic/roster testids removed from DOM; pitch container gains lg:col-span-12; pool-modal opens with SlotSpinner then card grid
Player pick → modal closes; place on pitch-slot-N → pool clears, filledCount=1
Draft-phase action bar: roll-dice-button-draft / change-button-draft / change-year-button-draft / reopen-pool-button all present when pool exists
back-to-setup-button visible at filledCount=0 in draft phase; clicking returns to setup (header & all 3 columns restored); hidden at filledCount>=1
Final view (11/11): 'KADRON HAZIR' message shown; start-tournament-button enabled; clicking navigates to TournamentScreen (ŞAMPIYONLAR LİGİ GRUP AŞAMASI with 8 groups including TEST TEAM in Group G)
